Loading the real workbook rows, building the search index, and preparing task-card-first SAC matching with smooth takeoff animation, cloud dissolve, and live progress.

SAC Finder

Task-card-first matching with the real workbook embedded inside the site

Find Your SAC from the full task card, real workbook rows, and operation-level matching.

This version searches your embedded workbook data directly. It looks at the task card line by line, detects operations like remove / install / inspect / repair / replace, tries to decide whether a removal is part of the core SAC or only access, checks APL only for access, validates against the real SAC definitions, and shows SACDB mother-child relations after the main match.
